description: This is a service class for managing User entities, providing methods for retrieving, creating, updating, and deleting users, with validation and exception handling.

classes.name: UserService
classes.description: Spring service class handling user-related operations such as retrieval, creation, update, and deletion.

methods.name: getOrThrow
methods.description: Fetches a User by ID, throws ResponseStatusException if not found.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns a paginated list of users, filtered by active status if specified.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new user after ensuring email uniqueness.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates an existing user's details, ensuring email uniqueness if changed.
